entities.name: CHICKPEA
entities.description: The legume species Cicer arietinum L. being studied for growth habit

entities.name: DETERMINATE GROWTH HABIT
entities.description: A plant growth characteristic where growth is limited, desirable to avoid excessive vegetative growth

entities.name: ICRISAT
entities.description: The International Crops Research Institute for the Semi-Arid Tropics in Patancheru, India

entities.name: EXCESSIVE VEGETATIVE GROWTH
entities.description: Undesirable plant growth that occurs under certain environmental conditions

entities.name: MUTATION BREEDING
entities.description: A breeding technique used to induce genetic mutations to create new traits

entities.name: ICCV 6
entities.description: A specific chickpea cultivar used as the starting material for mutation breeding

entities.name: IRRADIATION TREATMENTS
entities.description: The application of radiation to seeds to induce mutations

entities.name: FEMALE STERILITY
entities.description: The inability of a plant to produce functional female gametes, observed alongside determinate growth

entities.name: DIGENIC EPISTATIC INHERITANCE
entities.description: A mode of inheritance involving two genes where one masks the expression of another, showing a 3:13 ratio

entities.name: CD
entities.description: The allele that conditions for the determinancy trait

entities.name: DT
entities.description: The allele that expresses the determinate trait

entities.name: GROWING CONDITIONS
entities.description: Environmental factors that can influence the vegetative growth of the plant
